channel.title: brew on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in brew on IT notes

item.title: brew update formula
item.description: Example: brew bump-formula-pr --strict --url https://github.com/immortal/immortal/archive/0.24.2.tar.gz immortal it will need an API GIT token: export HOMEBREW_GITHUB_API_TOKEN=XXXXX To keep in sync forked repo: git fetch upstream git co upstream/master git push -f origin master
